subject: feat(dashboard): add loading indicators to tabs without pre-aggregated data
body:
During Phase 1 (summary loaded, commits still fetching), 6 tabs rendered
empty charts and zero counts with no feedback. Now each shows a spinner
with contextual message ("Loading health data...", etc.) until commits
arrive.

Tabs with loading indicators: TimingTab, TagsTab, ContributorsTab,
HealthTab, SecurityTab, DiscoverTab.

ProjectsTab: commit counts now return null during Phase 1 so cards hide
the count line instead of showing misleading "0 commits tracked".

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RbDmv8obRPnToLezqSGmHg
title: add loading indicators to tabs without pre-aggregated data
